# service/coffee/module/get-a-coffee/get-a-coffee.schema

> **Service Layer**

Effect Schema, JSON Schema, and StandardSchema definitions for the
`get-a-coffee` tool input.

## Remarks

Defines a single source-of-truth [GetACoffeeInput](variables/GetACoffeeInput.md) using
[Schema.Struct](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/), then derives three representations:

| Export                                                              | Purpose                               |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| [GetACoffeeInput](variables/GetACoffeeInput.md)                     | Effect Schema for runtime decoding    |
| [GetACoffeeInputJsonSchema](variables/GetACoffeeInputJsonSchema.md) | JSON Schema for documentation / tests |
| [GetACoffeeInputStandard](variables/GetACoffeeInputStandard.md)     | StandardSchema adapter for MCP SDK    |

## Variables

| Variable                                                            | Description                                                                                     |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [GetACoffeeInput](variables/GetACoffeeInput.md)                     | Effect Schema for validating `get-a-coffee` tool input.                                         |
| [GetACoffeeInputJsonSchema](variables/GetACoffeeInputJsonSchema.md) | JSON Schema representation derived from [GetACoffeeInput](variables/GetACoffeeInput.md).        |
| [GetACoffeeInputStandard](variables/GetACoffeeInputStandard.md)     | StandardSchema adapter bridging [GetACoffeeInput](variables/GetACoffeeInput.md) to the MCP SDK. |

## Type Aliases

| Type Alias                                         | Description                                                                               |
| -------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [GetACoffeeInput](type-aliases/GetACoffeeInput.md) | Inferred TypeScript type from the [GetACoffeeInput](variables/GetACoffeeInput.md) schema. |
